keywords.how: If there weren't so many people harassing me, life could be great.
keywords.are: If there weren't so many people harassing me, life could be great.
keywords.you: You are... uhm... welcome. Are you finished already?
keywords.sell: Hey, I am not a shopkeeper, I am an important man!
keywords.harassing: You need not ask me about that, you are perfect in that.
keywords.job: I am honored to be the assistant of the great, the illustrious, the magnificent Durin!
keywords.durin: Just between you and me, he can be quite a tyrant.
keywords.important: I am honored to be the assistant of the great, the illustrious, the magnificent Durin!
keywords.name: My name is Oswald, but let's proceed, I am a very busy man.
keywords.time: It is nearly tea time, so please hurry!
keywords.help: I inform higher officials of your need... sometimes.
keywords.dungeon: If you want to see dungeons just don't pay your taxes.
keywords.sewer: Our sewer system is very modern, but crowded with rats and wannabe heroes.
keywords.assistant: I have a job of great responsibility, mostly I keep annoying persons away from my boss.
keywords.annoying: You better don't ask, you wouldn't like the answer.
keywords.thank: You are... uhm... welcome. Are you finished already?
keywords.god: I think the gods are too busy to care about us mortals, hmm... that makes me feel godlike, too.
keywords.king: Ah, yes, yes, hail to King Tibianus! Long live the king and so on...
keywords.sam: A simple shopkeeper with minor intelligence.
keywords.benjamin: What do you expect from ex-soldiers? He is nuts! Hacked on the head far too often.
keywords.gorn: He sells his scrolls far too expensive.
keywords.quentin: I heard he was a ladies' man in younger days. In our days he is rumoured to wear women clothes now and then.
keywords.bozo: Isn't he the artist formerly known as the prince?
keywords.rumour: You know a rumour? TELL ME! TELL ME! TELL ME!
keywords.gossip: You know a rumour? TELL ME! TELL ME! TELL ME!
keywords.news: You know a rumour? TELL ME! TELL ME! TELL ME!
keywords.mud: I heared Sam dated a female mud-wrestler once.
keywords.weapon: It's rumoured that Sam does not forge all weapons himself, but buys them from his cousin, who is married to a cyclops.
keywords.magic: I overheard a conversation of officials, that magic will be forbidden soon.
keywords.power: There are people who talk about a rebellion against King Tibianus.
keywords.rebellion: There are people who talk about a rebellion against King Tibianus.
keywords.spell: I was told sometimes that sorcerers are toasted by misfired spells of their own.
keywords.muriel: He is rumoured to summon kinky demons to... well you know.
keywords.elane: They say she killed over a dozen husbands already.
keywords.marvik: Who knows what this old man is up to in his hideout when no one is watching?
keywords.gregor: I was told he lost a body part or two in duels... if you know what I mean.
keywords.lugri: Some say he is Ferumbras in disguise.
keywords.excalibug: It's beyond all doubt that certain sinister elements in our city have certain knowledge about this myth.
keywords.chester: I never found any rumour concerning him, isn't that odd?
keywords.ardua: She's a bitch, trust me. She was the girlfriend of the evil Partos some time ago.
keywords.partos: What a shame. He claimed to be the king of thiefs and was caught stealing some fruit.
keywords.gamel: This man lives in the darkness like a rat and is also as handsome as one of them. He surely is up to no good and often consorts with sinister strangers.
keywords.sinister: Just last week a one eyed man, who had a room at Frodo's, met him in the middle of the night.
keywords.strangers: Just last week a one eyed man, who had a room at Frodo's, met him in the middle of the night.
keywords.goshnar: They say he isn't truly dead. He was... or is a necromant after all.
keywords.necromant: You are not the first one to ask about that. Am I the only one that preferes wine to such disgusting stuff?
keywords.nectar: You are not the first one to ask about that. Am I the only one that preferes wine to such disgusting stuff?

texts: I am honored to be the assistant of the great, the illustrious, the magnificent Durin!
